title: Live Updates: BTS Takes the Stage After Nearly 4 Years
summary_full: K-pop’s biggest name will perform live in Seoul at 8 p.m. South Korea time (7 a.m. Eastern). The concert will be livestreamed by Netflix.
summary_public: K-pop’s biggest name will perform live in Seoul at 8 p.m. South Korea time (7 a.m. Eastern). The concert will be livestreamed by Netflix.
